meta.project: TheSynLab – AI-Powered Competitive Advantage & Ad Readiness Implementation Guide
meta.author: Expert Product & Brand Strategy Analysis
meta.description: Canonical implementation roadmap used by Cursor checklist execution.

implemented_in_this_commit: Additive Convex schema rollout for AI, CMP, ad slots, membership, and quality audits
AI stack sessions backend: create/get/update + generate action with Anthropic and safe fallback
AI risk profile backend: compute/store current profile
CMP backend mutations/queries for consent records
Content quality audit backend with task auto-creation for low-scoring posts
next_execution_order: Phase 1 UI layer: cookie banner wiring, ad slot provider, admin quality dashboard
Phase 2 UI: stack builder intake/result/refinement, risk cards, what-if panel
Phase 3 monetization and premium gating surfaces

notes.backend_rule: External AI calls are implemented as Convex actions.
notes.rate_limit_rule: Use novaRateLimits for AI feature usage caps before enabling production traffic.
